title: Feed Cleanup
subtitle: Review quiet subscriptions before you delete them.
empty: No feeds match the current cleanup view.
integrity_orphaned_articles_one: 1 article is pointing to a missing feed.
integrity_orphaned_articles_other: {{count}} articles are pointing to missing feeds.
integrity_empty: There are no broken references to review.
integrity_issue_summary_one: 1 article is pointing at this missing feed.
integrity_issue_summary_other: {{count}} articles are pointing at this missing feed.
integrity_filter_note: Cleanup filters are hidden while you review broken references.
no_selection: Select a candidate to review its details.
candidate_summary_stale_and_inactive: 90+ days quiet with no unread backlog.
candidate_summary_stale_with_no_stars: Quiet for a long time and not supporting any starred articles.
candidate_summary_inactive_without_signa: No unread or starred activity is pulling this feed forward.
candidate_summary_stale_but_supported: The feed is quiet, but there is still a signal worth checking before deleting.
candidate_summary_healthy_feed: This feed still has recent or meaningful activity.
editor_maintenance_description: Use these actions when you want to re-check or remove this subscription.
editor_refetch_in_progress: A sync is already in progress
